ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The future of .NET UI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
Language: c%23
This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for .NET. For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-net.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MudBlazor/MudBlazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor
Language: c%23
Blazor Component Library based on Material Design principles. Do more with Blazor, utilizing CSS and keeping JavaScript to a bare minimum.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PowerShell/PowerShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell
Language: c%23
PowerShell for every system!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitwarden/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitwarden/server
Language: c%23
Bitwarden infrastructure/backend (API, database, Docker, etc).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/extensions
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/extensions
Language: c%23
This repository contains a suite of libraries that provide facilities commonly needed when creating production-ready applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duplicati/duplicati
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duplicati/duplicati
Language: c%23
Store securely encrypted backups in the cloud!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
Language: c%23
Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: icsharpcode/ILSpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/icsharpcode/ILSpy
Language: c%23
.NET Decompiler with support for PDB generation, ReadyToRun, Metadata (&more) - cross-platform!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
Language: c%23
Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
Language: c%23
Clean Architecture Solution Template for ASP.NET Core

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nopSolutions/nopCommerce
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nopSolutions/nopCommerce
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core eCommerce software. nopCommerce is a free and open-source shopping cart.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ppy/osu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ppy/osu
Language: c%23
rhythm is just a *click* away!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unoplatform/uno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unoplatform/uno
Language: c%23
Open-source platform for building cross-platform native Mobile, Web, Desktop and Embedded apps quickly. Create rich, C#/XAML, single-codebase apps from any IDE. Hot Reload included! 90m+ NuGet Downloads!!
